content.json:
# 📖 Transpose Pipeline — Live Operations Dashboard
Real-time pipeline visibility for operators. Shows stage progression, translation progress, errors, and content filter events.

## Live Pipeline Status
Shows which stages are currently running or recently completed. Refresh to track real-time progression.

content.query:
// Active pipeline runs — most recent stage per book
let book_filter = '{BookId}';
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == 'transpose.pipeline.stage_duration'
| extend stage = tostring(customDimensions.stage), book_id = tostring(customDimensions.book_id)
| where book_filter == '' or book_id == book_filter
| where stage != 'total'
| summarize last_ts = max(timestamp), duration_s = round(avg(value), 1) by book_id, stage
| extend stage_order = case(
    stage == 'ingest', 1,
    stage == 'ocr', 2,
    stage == 'chunk', 3,
    stage == 'translate', 4,
    stage == 'glossary', 5,
    stage == 'assemble', 6,
    stage == 'export', 7,
    99)
| order by book_id asc, stage_order asc
| project Book = book_id, Stage = stage, ['Duration (s)'] = duration_s, Completed = last_ts
content.title: Stage Completion Timeline

content.query:
// Gantt-style stage timeline
let book_filter = '{BookId}';
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == 'transpose.pipeline.stage_duration'
| extend stage = tostring(customDimensions.stage), book_id = tostring(customDimensions.book_id)
| where book_filter == '' or book_id == book_filter
| where stage != 'total'
| summarize stage_end = max(timestamp), duration_s = avg(value) by book_id, stage
| extend stage_start = datetime_add('second', -toint(duration_s), stage_end)
| project book_id, stage, stage_start, stage_end, duration_s = round(duration_s, 1)
| order by book_id asc, stage_start asc
content.title: Stage Gantt View (Start → End)

content.query:
// Current pipeline stage — latest stage with no 'total' completion
let book_filter = '{BookId}';
let completed_books = customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == 'transpose.pipeline.stage_duration'
| extend stage = tostring(customDimensions.stage), book_id = tostring(customDimensions.book_id)
| where stage == 'total'
| distinct book_id;
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == 'transpose.pipeline.stage_duration'
| extend stage = tostring(customDimensions.stage), book_id = tostring(customDimensions.book_id)
| where book_filter == '' or book_id == book_filter
| where stage != 'total'
| summarize stages_done = dcount(stage), last_stage = arg_max(timestamp, stage) by book_id
| extend Status = iff(book_id in (completed_books), '✅ Complete', strcat('🔄 Running — ', stage, ' (', stages_done, '/7)'))
| project Book = book_id, ['Current Stage'] = stage, ['Stages Done'] = stages_done, Status, ['Last Update'] = timestamp
content.title: Pipeline Run Status

content.json:
## Translation Progress
Track chunk-level translation progress: completed, failed, and remaining.

content.title: Translation Summary
Translation Throughput (chunks / 5 min)
Cumulative Chunks Translated
Token Usage Over Time

content.json:
## Per-Stage Timing
Breakdown of how long each pipeline stage takes. Use this to identify bottlenecks.

content.query:
// Per-stage duration breakdown — avg, p50, p95, max
let book_filter = '{BookId}';
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == 'transpose.pipeline.stage_duration'
| extend stage = tostring(customDimensions.stage), book_id = tostring(customDimensions.book_id)
| where book_filter == '' or book_id == book_filter
| where stage != 'total'
| summarize
    avg_s = round(avg(value), 1),
    p50_s = round(percentile(value, 50), 1),
    p95_s = round(percentile(value, 95), 1),
    max_s = round(max(value), 1),
    runs = count()
  by stage
| extend stage_order = case(
    stage == 'ingest', 1, stage == 'ocr', 2, stage == 'chunk', 3,
    stage == 'translate', 4, stage == 'glossary', 5,
    stage == 'assemble', 6, stage == 'export', 7, 99)
| order by stage_order asc
| project Stage = stage, ['Avg (s)'] = avg_s, ['P50 (s)'] = p50_s, ['P95 (s)'] = p95_s, ['Max (s)'] = max_s, Runs = runs
content.title: Stage Duration Breakdown
Time Spent per Stage (by Book)

content.query:
// Total pipeline duration
let book_filter = '{BookId}';
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == 'transpose.pipeline.stage_duration'
| extend stage = tostring(customDimensions.stage), book_id = tostring(customDimensions.book_id)
| where book_filter == '' or book_id == book_filter
| where stage == 'total'
| summarize
    avg_total_s = round(avg(value), 1),
    min_total_s = round(min(value), 1),
    max_total_s = round(max(value), 1),
    runs = count()
| project ['Avg Total (s)'] = avg_total_s, ['Min (s)'] = min_total_s, ['Max (s)'] = max_total_s, ['Pipeline Runs'] = runs
content.title: End-to-End Pipeline Duration
Stage Duration Trend

content.json:
## Errors & Content Filters
Error rates by stage, content filter blocks, and fallback recovery.

content.title: Errors by Stage & Type
Error Rate Over Time (by Stage)
Content Filter Summary

content.query:
// Content filter events over time
let book_filter = '{BookId}';
customMetrics
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name in ('transpose.translation.content_filter_blocks', 'transpose.translation.content_filter_fallback_success')
| extend book_id = tostring(customDimensions.book_id)
| where book_filter == '' or book_id == book_filter
| extend metric = case(
    name == 'transpose.translation.content_filter_blocks', 'Blocked',
    name == 'transpose.translation.content_filter_fallback_success', 'Recovered',
    name)
| summarize count = sum(value) by metric, bin(timestamp, 10m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Content Filter Events Over Time
Translation Errors by Type

content.query:
// Recent exceptions
exceptions
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize count() by type, outerMessage, bin(timestamp, 15m)
| order by timestamp desc
| take 20
| project Timestamp = timestamp, Type = type, Message = outerMessage, Count = count_
content.title: Recent Exceptions

content.json:
## Pipeline Health
Overall health indicators: success rates, dependency health, and OCR quality.

content.title: Pipeline Success Rate
OCR Quality

content.query:
// Dependency health — Azure services
dependencies
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize
    calls = count(),
    avg_ms = round(avg(duration), 1),
    p95_ms = round(percentile(duration, 95), 1),
    failures = countif(success == false)
  by type, target
| extend ['Failure Rate %'] = round(100.0 * failures / calls, 1)
| order by calls desc
| project Service = type, Target = target, Calls = calls, ['Avg (ms)'] = avg_ms, ['P95 (ms)'] = p95_ms, Failures = failures, ['Failure Rate %']
content.title: Azure Service Dependencies

content.query:
// OpenAI throttling (429s)
dependencies
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where target has 'openai'
| where resultCode == '429'
| summarize throttle_count = count() by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: OpenAI Rate Limiting (HTTP 429)
